title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates:
Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates!
